events.text:

The staged parts are clean, intact, and sized for the work shown. Reference materials on hand: TIA-568, NEC 800.

This is a "staged" condition - materials, tools, and access are ready, but work has not begun. Everything checks out - correct sizing, ratings, application, clean and intact parts. No defects or hazards mentioned.
